context: The solution must build a complete clause map from a legal contract, capturing every top-level clause and sub-clause with its number and heading. For Word documents, parsing must be programmatic. The resulting map must be retained as ground truth throughout the session.

checklist.name: Top-level clause enumeration
checklist.description: All top-level clauses included in the map

checklist.name: Sub-clause enumeration
checklist.description: All sub-clauses included with their numbers

checklist.name: Programmatic parsing for .docx
checklist.description: Uses code-based parsing (not screenshots) for Word files

checklist.name: Map used as ground truth
checklist.description: Clause map referenced in subsequent verification steps

checklist.name: Completeness
checklist.description: Does not omit any clauses visible in the document
